name: Orbit Ring Gallery
pitch: Scroll to revolve through an immersive 3D ring of images, with the active hero image scaling dynamically at the forefront.

lifecycle.idle: Slow, ambient micro-rotation of the ring (0.5deg/s) on the Y axis.
lifecycle.discovery: As scroll begins, the ring accelerates into position, bringing the first item forward.
lifecycle.buildUp: Scroll scrubs the Y rotation of the entire group. Items approaching front scale up and glow.
lifecycle.peak: Active item hits front-center: max scale, glassmorphic glow, and parallax hover active.
lifecycle.recovery: Scroll stops; ring easing settles. Glow stabilizes and text fades in.
